title: deepEqual
goal: Create src/deepequal.mjs exporting function deepEqual(a, b): structural equality for JSON-like values (nested objects and arrays, primitives). Key order does not matter. NaN equals NaN.
notes: Golden must stress: nested objects with different key order (equal), arrays of differing length (unequal), NaN vs NaN (equal), and null vs undefined (unequal). Visible can test two flat equal objects.
